_comment: Gemini function declarations for buda-mcp v1.2.0. Pass this array as the `tools[0].functionDeclarations` field when calling the Gemini API. See: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/function-calling

functionDeclarations.name: get_markets
functionDeclarations.description: List all available cryptocurrency trading pairs on Buda.com (Chile, Colombia, Peru), or get details for a specific market. Returns base/quote currencies, maker/taker fees, and minimum order sizes.

market_id.description: Optional market identifier such as 'BTC-CLP', 'ETH-BTC', or 'BTC-COP'. Case-insensitive. Omit to list all available markets.

functionDeclarations.name: get_ticker
functionDeclarations.description: Get the current market ticker for a Buda.com trading pair. Returns the last traded price, best bid (max_bid), best ask (min_ask), 24-hour volume, and price change percentage over 24 hours and 7 days.

market_id.description: Market identifier such as 'BTC-CLP', 'ETH-COP', or 'ETH-BTC'. Case-insensitive.

functionDeclarations.name: get_orderbook
functionDeclarations.description: Get the current limit order book for a Buda.com market. Returns sorted arrays of bids (buy orders) and asks (sell orders). Each entry is a [price, amount] pair. Useful for analyzing market depth and calculating slippage.

market_id.description: Market identifier such as 'BTC-CLP' or 'ETH-BTC'. Case-insensitive.

limit.description: Maximum number of price levels to return per side (bids and asks). Defaults to all levels if omitted.

functionDeclarations.name: get_trades
functionDeclarations.description: Get recent trade history for a Buda.com market. Each trade entry contains [timestamp_ms, amount, price, direction] where direction is 'buy' or 'sell'. Supports pagination via the timestamp parameter.

market_id.description: Market identifier such as 'BTC-CLP' or 'ETH-BTC'. Case-insensitive.

limit.description: Number of trades to return. Default is 50, maximum is 100.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp in seconds. When provided, returns trades that occurred before this timestamp, enabling pagination through historical data.

functionDeclarations.name: get_market_volume
functionDeclarations.description: Get 24-hour and 7-day transacted volume for a Buda.com market, broken down by side: ask_volume (sell orders) and bid_volume (buy orders). Amounts are in the market's base currency.

market_id.description: Market identifier such as 'BTC-CLP', 'ETH-COP', or 'ETH-BTC'. Case-insensitive.

functionDeclarations.name: get_spread
functionDeclarations.description: Calculate the bid/ask spread for a Buda.com market. Returns the best bid price, best ask price, absolute spread, and spread as a percentage of the ask price. Useful for assessing market liquidity.

market_id.description: Market identifier such as 'BTC-CLP', 'ETH-COP', or 'ETH-BTC'. Case-insensitive.

functionDeclarations.name: compare_markets
functionDeclarations.description: Compare ticker data side-by-side for all trading pairs of a given base currency across Buda.com's supported quote currencies (CLP, COP, PEN, USDC, BTC, ETH). For example, 'BTC' returns data for BTC-CLP, BTC-COP, BTC-PEN, and BTC-USDC.

base_currency.description: Base currency to compare across all available markets. Examples: 'BTC', 'ETH', 'XRP'. Case-insensitive.

functionDeclarations.name: get_price_history
functionDeclarations.description: IMPORTANT: Candles are aggregated client-side from raw trades (Buda has no native candlestick endpoint) — increase 'limit' for deeper history. Returns OHLCV (open/high/low/close/volume) price history for a Buda.com market. Candle timestamps are UTC bucket boundaries. Supports 1h, 4h, and 1d candle periods.

market_id.description: Market identifier such as 'BTC-CLP' or 'ETH-BTC'. Case-insensitive.

period.description: Candle period: '1h' (1 hour), '4h' (4 hours), or '1d' (1 day). Default is '1h'.

limit.description: Number of raw trades to fetch before aggregation. Default is 100, maximum is 1000. More trades = deeper history.
